differential_diagnoses: IgG4-related disease with systemic bone involvement
Overlap syndrome: ECD and IgG4-related disease
next_steps: Perform immunohistochemical staining for CD1a, Langerin, CD68, and CD163 to characterize the histiocytic population
Test for the BRAF V600E mutation and other MAPK pathway mutations in the bone biopsy tissue
Initiate systemic therapy with corticosteroids as a bridging strategy
Evaluate for targeted therapy (e.g., BRAF/MEK inhibitors) pending mutation status
Assess for asymptomatic extra-skeletal involvement, including cardiovascular and neurological status
Coordinate with specialized hematopathology for review of all previous biopsy samples
